title: OneSMP Modpack
description: Designed to enhance the vanilla Minecraft experience with subtle, meaningful improvements. Built for play.onesmp.us
body: Personalized fork of Fabulously Optimized, a well-known, performance-focused modpack for Fabric. We've tailored it specifically for the OneSMP server by keeping the optimizations and carefully adding curated, lightweight enhancements that improve the vanilla feel without disrupting it.
